title: Mastering CSS 'line-height' for Superior UI Readability and Visual Rhythm
tweet: Elevate your UI design! Discover how precise CSS 'line-height' impacts readability & visual flow, a critical factor for exceptional user experience. #CSSTypography #UIDesign #WebFonts #UX
tip: Beyond simple numbers, calculate 'line-height' relative to your font-size and consider the x-height/cap-height of your specific web font. Aim for a value that offers sufficient breathing room between lines, typically 1.4 to 1.6 for body text, adapting for smaller or larger text sizes. Prioritize consistent vertical rhythm across UI components for a harmonious and professional look.
